history.prompt:
SYSTEM: You generate non-medical food sensitivity guidance.
RULES: no diagnosis, no treatment, no drugs, no supplements, no restrictive diets, no absolutes.
LANG: ro
SUBSCRIPTION_TIER: new
DETAIL_LEVEL: detailed
DIETARY_PREFERENCE: normal
INTOLERANCES: none
MONITORING_ENTRIES:
{"date":"2024-06-01","hour":"13:20","foods":["Salată cu ton","Pâine fără gluten","Mere"],"symptoms":["balonare"],"intensity":3,"latency":60}
{"date":"2024-05-30","hour":"12:40","foods":["Orez cu legume","Pui la grătar","Portocală"],"symptoms":[],"intensity":0,"latency":null}
{"date":"2024-05-28","hour":"19:10","foods":["Pizza (conținea urme de lactoză)","Suc de portocale"],"symptoms":["balonare","dureri_abdominale","greata"],"intensity":7,"latency":45}
OUTPUT_SCHEMA: recommendedFoods[], avoidFoods[], mealExamples[], generalTips[], disclaimer

monitoringEntries.notes: Ușoară balonare după masă, a dispărut în aproximativ o oră.
Reacție clară la pizza. Evit în viitor.

mealExamples.name: Masa 1 - varianta echilibrata
mealExamples.notes: Portie moderata, ritm lent, observatie simptome in primele 120 minute.

mealExamples.name: Masa 2 - varianta usoara
mealExamples.notes: Evita combinatiile multiple noi in aceeasi zi.

generalTips: Prioritizeaza mesele simple cu putine ingrediente noi.
result.disclaimer: Aceste recomandari descriu probabilitati si corelatii observate in jurnal si nu reprezinta sfat medical.
warnings: Corelatiile sunt orientative si depind de consecventa jurnalului.
Testeaza ajustarile in pasi mici, pe intervale de 2-3 zile.

history.prompt:
SYSTEM: You generate non-medical food sensitivity guidance.
RULES: no diagnosis, no treatment, no drugs, no supplements, no restrictive diets, no absolutes.
LANG: en
SUBSCRIPTION_TIER: new
DETAIL_LEVEL: detailed
DIETARY_PREFERENCE: normal
INTOLERANCES: lactoza,gluten
MONITORING_ENTRIES:
{"date":"2026-06-08","hour":"08:30","foods":["milk","toast","coffee"],"symptoms":["balonare"],"intensity":4,"latency":45}
{"date":"2026-06-08","hour":"13:15","foods":["rice","chicken","salad"],"symptoms":[],"intensity":0,"latency":null}
OUTPUT_SCHEMA: recommendedFoods[], avoidFoods[], mealExamples[], generalTips[], disclaimer

mealExamples.name: Meal 1 - balanced option
mealExamples.notes: Moderate portion, slow pace, observe symptoms in the first 120 minutes.

mealExamples.name: Meal 2 - light option
mealExamples.notes: Avoid introducing multiple new combinations on the same day.

generalTips: Prioritize simple meals with few new ingredients.
result.disclaimer: These recommendations describe probabilities and journal correlations and are not medical advice.
warnings: Correlations are indicative and depend on journal consistency.
Test adjustments in small steps over 2-3 day windows.
